Package org.eventb.core.ast.datatype

Interface IDestructorExtension

All Superinterfaces:
IConstructorArgument, IExpressionExtension, IFormulaExtension
All Known Implementing Classes:
DestructorExtension
public interface IDestructorExtension extends IConstructorArgument, IExpressionExtension
Common protocol for datatype destructor extensions.

A destructor extension is the implementation of a datatype destructor, it is characterized by its name and its return type.

Since:
3.0

  • Field Summary
